annotations.annotation: Effective date:
Regulations .01—.12 adopted as an emergency provision effective
August 28, 1986 (13:20 Md. R. 2201); emergency status extended at 14:2
Md. R. 124; emergency status expired March 1, 1987
Regulations .01—.12 adopted effective March 1, 1987 (14:4 Md. R. 414)
Chapter recodified from COMAR 05.01.25 to COMAR 05.07.02
Regulation .01 amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .02B amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .03A amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .04A—C amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .05 repealed and new Regulation .05 adopted effective June 11,
Regulation .06 repealed and new Regulation .06 adopted effective June 11,
Regulation .07A, B amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .07A—C amended effective May 29, 1989 (16:10 Md. R. 1105)
Regulation .07D amended effective February 18, 1991 (18:3 Md. R. 302)
Regulation .08 repealed and new Regulation .08 adopted effective June 11,
Regulation .09 amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .10A amended effective June 11, 1990 (17:11 Md. R. 1340)
Regulation .10B amended effective February 18, 1991 (18:3 Md. R. 302)
Chapter repealed effective September 6, 1999 (26:18 Md. R. 1373)
